subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath believed and been guided. Say: By God! The fragrances of the All-Merciful have wafted from the direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی آمن و هدی قل تالله ان نفحات الرحمن قد هبت عن شطر
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God
